metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2488
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Results Section: "ZnT1 concentrates at the postsynaptic density"

-Literal: "Particle distribution along the axis perpendicular to the
synaptic junction revealed a main peak on the cytoplasmic
side of the postsynaptic membrane (7.1 ± 0.8 nm from the
membrane; n = 339 particles and 132 synapses) (Figure 2F)."

"The results indicate that ZnT1 concentrates in the postsynaptic membrane of
hippocampal synapses,...."

13/2/2018 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Fig.1: Seems to be performed in mice: "BALB/c mice (2 month-old) were anesthesized and perfused ... Hippocampi were collected from postnatal day 1 pups..."

Fig.2+3: Materials and Methods Section: "Post-embedding immunoelectron microscopy"
-Literal:"For acrylic embedding, brains from two Wistar rats (250-
300 g) were perfused with 4% formaldehyde..."
